description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:1.12.3-git image with the docker:1.12.3-dind service and a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token. Define stages build-base, build, test, release, deploy and set variables for container image tags. Add a "build base image" job in the build-base stage that runs only on tags and executes docker build -f rapps.base.Dockerfile -t $CONTAINER_BASE_IMAGE ., docker push $CONTAINER_BASE_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_BASE_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_BASE_IMAGE, docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_BASE_IMAGE. Add a "build database image" job in the same stage, also only on tags, that builds and pushes the database image using rapps.database.Dockerfile and tags it similarly. Add a "build to realease" job in the build stage for the production environment, only on tags, that runs sed to set production: True in config/config.dist.yaml, then builds and pushes $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Add a "build to test" job in the build stage for the devel environment, runs on all branches except master, that builds and pushes $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. Finally, add a "release-image" job in the release stage for the production environment, only on tags, that pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, tags it as $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE and pushes it.
